'''Premier Provisions''' was a small company that operated out of a [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] ranch on [[Tyed Kant]]. In addition, the company owned a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] named [[J-3PA]]. Premier Provisions specialized in the production of unique and specialized foods. The company's headquarters was also the location of a fairly advanced [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] listening post.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Mynock Conspiracy|book=Supernova (sourcebook)}}
